# Roflumilast 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Roflumilast 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Roflumilast</strong> 目前有 <strong>12 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Roflumilast 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Daxas is indicated for maintenance treatment of severe chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) (FEV1 post-bronchodilator less than 50% predicted) associated with chronic bronchitis in adult...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>pulmonary hypertension（97.2%）</li>
<li>kyphoscoliotic heart disease（96.7%）</li>
<li>headache disorder（93.1%）</li>
<li>female breast carcinoma（92.8%）</li>
<li>trigeminal autonomic cephalalgia（92.2%）</li>
<li>obsolete patella aplasia, coxa vara, and tarsal synostosis（89.9%）</li>
<li>hypertrichosis (disease)（89.0%）</li>
<li>Ambras type hypertrichosis universalis congenita（89.0%）</li>
<li>malformation syndrome with odontal and/or periodontal component（88.3%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension, primary, autosomal recessive（88.0%）</li>
<li>syndrome with a Dandy-Walker malformation as major feature（88.0%）</li>
<li>familial clubfoot due to 17q23.1q23.2 microduplication（87.3%）</li>
<li>coxopodopatellar syndrome（87.2%）</li>
<li>chromosome 17q23.1-q23.2 deletion syndrome（87.0%）</li>
<li>isolated genetic hair shaft abnormality（86.9%）</li>
<li>cor pulmonale（86.9%）</li>
<li>mycotic corneal ulcer（86.0%）</li>
<li>scalp dermatosis（85.2%）</li>
<li>primary hereditary glaucoma（85.2%）</li>
<li>open-angle glaucoma（84.2%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/roflumilast/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
